name: avatars
title: Show More Avatars
description: Allows showing more avatars on posts

staplerAvatars.name: Staple author avatars
staplerAvatars.tooltip: Shows the avatar of the user that stapled a post.

floatingAvatars.name: Floating author avatars
floatingAvatars.tooltip: Makes post author avatars larger, displayed to the left of posts, and scrolled with the timeline. Will display the stapler if the post is a staple.
